in_session_iterations.precedent: M11a-extension D-C3.attempt1.C + M11a-extension-extension D-C2.attempt1.C + D-C3.attempt1.C + D-C4.attempt1.C + D-C5.attempt1.C + D-C6.attempt1.C + D-C7.attempt1.C in-session single-clause-revision precedent — NOT counted as rejection-and-retry per fresh-redraft-counts-only convention (M11a-extension D-C7.attempt1.D / D-C9.attempt1.C fresh-redraft rejection precedent — those involved substantial multi-clause redrafts; here all 9 cluster-level revisions are single-clause substitutions with the substantive trace content bytewise stable in meaning); single-clause-only author-discipline + substantive bytewise stability held; bounded by the C4/C5/C6/C7 precedent that 1-4 distinct single-clause revisions within a single attempt remain bounded by single-clause-only author-discipline. NOTE on C8 extension of the in-session-revision-count precedent: 9 cluster-level revisions across 2 iteration rounds extends the prior precedent (C1 0x, C2 1x, C3 1x +1 Step-3.5 token, C4 3x, C5 1x, C6 4x, C7 1x); the bounded discipline holds because (a) each revision IS still single-clause (a phrase swap maintaining substantive bytewise stability in meaning), (b) the substantive content of all 5 GTs + briefing + 5 intents + 4 distractors remains bytewise stable in meaning (household-elderly-mother urosepsis presentation unchanged; CFA Level III exam sit-date advancement unchanged; OpsGenie SEV-A Kubernetes pod-eviction storm unchanged; OPO UNOS-kidney-waitlist deceased-donor offer unchanged; NWS Sterling/LWX derecho damaging-wind warning unchanged; 4 V2 NO distractors substantively unchanged), and (c) the high revision count reflects the generic shared-language across prior on-call escalation templates (the 75-min checkpoint + bridge + cross-paged + hooked-in + response-manager pattern) and emergency-medical-response templates (the paramedic-ETA + resuscitation-bay coordination + MICU handoff pattern) which carry forward generic SRE-team and EMS-handoff narrative cadence across multiple prior medical-emergency and production/on-call traces. Disclosed transparently for reviewer audit.
